params.command: git status && echo "---" && git log --oneline -5 && echo "---REMOTE---" && git remote -v
params.description: Check git status, log, and remotes

params.command: cat .gitignore 2>/dev/null; echo "---TRACKED .claude---"; git ls-files .claude | head -20; echo "---"; gh auth status 2>
params.description: Check gitignore, tracked .claude files, gh auth

params.command:
git add -A && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Add session log
